video.heading: EVERY BLADE TELLS A STORY
video.p1: At SPHandcraft, every blade is born in fire and shaped by hand. Our master artisans forge each piece using techniques passed down through generations — from selecting the finest Damascus steel to hand-shaping ergonomic handles with meticulous care.
video.p2: Founded in Bucharest, our workshop blends time-honored blacksmithing with modern precision. Every knife, axe, and tool that leaves our forge carries the spirit of the craftsman who made it — a testament to patience, skill, and an unwavering commitment to quality.
video.quote: "We do not just make tools. We forge heirlooms — pieces built to last a lifetime and worthy of being passed to the next generation."

about.heading: HANDCRAFTED WITH PASSION
about.p1: Each SPHandcraft blade is forged by skilled artisans using traditional techniques passed down through generations. From selecting the finest Damascus steel to hand-shaping ergonomic handles, every step is done with meticulous care.
about.p2: Our workshop in Bucharest combines time-honored blacksmithing with modern precision. The result? Blades that are not only beautiful display pieces but reliable tools ready for any adventure.

howItsForged.heroSubtitle: From raw steel to finished masterpiece — every SPHandcraft blade passes through six meticulous stages, each performed by hand in our Bucharest workshop.

steps.title: 01 — Selecting the Steel
steps.desc: Every blade begins with the finest materials. We source high-carbon Damascus steel billets from trusted European suppliers, ensuring each piece has the perfect grain structure and carbon content for exceptional edge retention.

steps.title: 02 — Forging & Shaping
steps.desc: The steel is heated to over 1,000°C in our coal forge until it glows orange-hot. Using traditional hammer techniques, our master artisans shape the blade, drawing out the tip and forming the tang in a single continuous piece of metal.

steps.title: 03 — Grinding & Profiling
steps.desc: Once cooled, the blade is rough-ground to reveal the basic profile. This is where the Damascus pattern first becomes visible. Skilled hands guide the blade across water-cooled grinders, establishing the primary bevel and edge geometry.

steps.title: 04 — Heat Treatment
steps.desc: The blade undergoes a precise heat-treatment cycle — heated again, then quenched in oil to harden the steel. A tempering process follows, relieving internal stresses and striking the perfect balance between hardness and flexibility.

steps.title: 05 — Handle Crafting
steps.desc: While the blade rests, our handle craftsmen select and shape premium materials — walnut burl, stabilized wood, polished bone, or micarta. Each handle is hand-fitted to its tang, then pinned and epoxied for a lifelong bond.

steps.title: 06 — Final Assembly & Sharpening
steps.desc: The final stage brings everything together. The blade is hand-sharpened to a razor edge on Japanese water stones, the handle is finished with multiple coats of oil, and each piece is inspected, stamped, and prepared for its new owner.

howItsForged.ctaSubtitle: Visit our workshop or browse our collection to see the results of this ancient craft. Every blade carries the soul of the artisan who forged it.

guarantee.title: LIFETIME WARRANTY
guarantee.subtitle: Every blade is built to last a lifetime
guarantee.desc: We stand behind every piece that leaves our forge. Each SPHandcraft blade comes with a full lifetime warranty against manufacturing defects — because heirlooms shouldn't have an expiration date.
